sentences.text: I wake up early when the sun begins to rise.
Bright sunlight enters my room through the window.
I stretch my arms before getting out of bed.
I feel fresh after washing my face.
I make my bed neatly every morning.
Birds sing softly outside my house.
I start my day with a happy smile.
I brush my teeth carefully every morning.
I use mint toothpaste to keep them clean.
I rinse my mouth after brushing properly.
I wash my face with cool water.
I look in the mirror before combing my hair.
My mother reminds me to brush twice daily.
I feel clean and fresh after finishing.
I wear my clean school uniform every morning.
I button my shirt carefully before leaving home.
I polish my shoes to make them shine.
I comb my hair neatly in front of the mirror.
I check my school bag before going outside.
My mother helps me tie my shoelaces.
I feel ready and confident for school.
I walk to school with my best friend.
We talk happily while walking together.
We reach school before the bell rings.
The school gate opens at the right time.
Teachers greet us warmly at the entrance.
We enter our classroom quietly.
Our lessons begin after morning assembly.
I sit at my desk to complete my homework.
I read the questions carefully before answering.
I write neatly in my notebook.
My mother helps me when I feel confused.
I check my work before closing my book.
I finish my homework before dinner time.
I feel proud because I worked hard.
I play in the park after finishing my homework.
My friends arrive when the weather is pleasant.
We run and laugh together happily.
Some children play football on the field.
We drink water after playing for a long time.
The sun slowly sets in the evening sky.
I return home when it becomes dark.
Our family eats dinner together every night.
Mother serves warm food on the table.
We talk about our day while eating.
Father shares interesting stories during dinner.
We say thank you before leaving the table.
We clean the dishes after finishing.
Dinner time makes our family closer.
I watch my favorite cartoon after dinner.
The cartoon makes me laugh loudly.
My sister joins me on the sofa.
We keep the volume low because father is resting.
We enjoy the funny scenes together.
Mother reminds us to turn off the TV early.
We switch it off before going to bed.
I read an interesting book before sleeping.
The story becomes exciting when the hero appears.
I turn each page carefully.
I imagine the scenes inside my mind.
Reading helps me learn new words.
My father encourages me to read daily.
I feel calm after finishing the story.
I wear my soft pajamas before bedtime.
I brush my teeth carefully every night.
Mother reads a short story to me.
The room becomes quiet when the lights turn off.
I close my eyes and relax peacefully.
The cool air moves gently in the room.
I fall asleep after a long busy day.
